code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut max_val = 0
mut has_pos = false
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  mut is_ws = false
  mut cur = 0
  if not is_end
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      cur = b
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        is_ws = true
      end
    when None
      is_ws = true
    end
  end

  if is_end or is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          if not has_pos
            max_val = v
            has_pos = true
          else if v > max_val
            max_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(cur)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_pos
  println("max=#{max_val}")
else
  println("none")
end
